title: Abyssal Legacy
description: A Performance and QOL focused Vanilla Plus Mod pack Focused on Old Legacy console edition nostalgia
body:
Abyssal Legacy Updates Slower than Abyssal optimized and has slightly worse performance but still focuses on performance and qol

The main differences from Abyssal Optimized to Abyssal Legacy are a few of the QOL mods like connected textures, a lot of major visual differences and some gameplay changes like world gen.

Abyssal Legacy aims to make modern minecraft look and feel like minecraft used to if it were to continue as was from 1.12 while updating the textures with the Vintage remastered pack and many more Visual and Audio mods such as console sounds and other console exclusives.

This is a Mix of beta minecraft and the legacy console editions of minecraft.

Link for the Vintage - Remastered Programmer Art texture pack because Its not on modrinth https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/vanilla-mix-w-i-p-preview/
